title: Spec §17.7 SLIP RAM figure (256 B) vs ~3.7 KB implementation
description: spec/11-lci.md:655 memory-impact table lists 'SLIP framing | 256 B RAM'. lichen/subsys/lichen/transport/slip_transport.c:61,69,74 statically allocates ~3.7 KB per context (1280 B RX packet buffer, 2562 B TX frame buffer, 256 B ring; +2562 B last_tx under ZTEST). Table is informative, and 1280 B RX follows from the IPv6 minimum MTU — the right call — but spec and implementation have diverged. Fix: update the §17.7 figure to reflect a 1280-MTU implementation (~2-4 KB).
